title: Step 1: Enter Current Cluster
subtitle: Enter your existing cluster metrics. Required fields are marked.

tooltips.totalVcpus: Total vCPU reservations across all VMs. Found in vCenter Summary or cluster overview.
tooltips.totalPcores: Physical CPU cores in the cluster. Use spec sheet cores — NOT hyperthreaded logical CPUs.
tooltips.totalVms: Total number of powered-on VMs in the cluster.
tooltips.totalDiskGb: Total provisioned disk space across all VMs (GB).
tooltips.existingServerCount: Number of physical servers currently in the cluster (used for SPECint sizing).
tooltips.socketsPerServer: Number of physical CPU sockets per existing server.
tooltips.coresPerSocket: Physical cores per socket from spec sheet — NOT OS-reported logical processors.
tooltips.ramPerServerGb: Total RAM installed per existing server (GB).
tooltips.cpuUtilizationPercent: Current average CPU utilization percent (0–100). Used to scale effective vCPU demand.
tooltips.ramUtilizationPercent: Current average RAM utilization percent (0–100). Used to scale effective RAM demand.
tooltips.cpuFrequencyGhz: Average CPU clock frequency of existing servers in GHz. Auto-filled from RVTools/LiveOptics import when available.
tooltips.specintPerServer: SPECrate2017_int_base score per existing server. Find at fjacquet.github.io/spec-search → filter by processor. Default is Dell R660 with 2x Xeon Gold 6526Y (~337). Both existing and target must use the same metric.

currentClusterForm.utilizationHint: Most environments run well below 100%. Enter measured (LiveOptics) or a careful estimate.
currentClusterForm.utilizationHintStretch: Stretch clusters often run <50% per site.

derivedMetrics.title: Derived Metrics
derivedMetrics.footnote: Updates live as you enter values. VMs/Server is based on first scenario defaults. Avg metrics from import data.

fileImport.errorFallback: Failed to read file. Please check the file and try again.

importPreview.title: Import Preview
importPreview.description: Review the extracted data before populating the form.
importPreview.stretchSizingNote: Sizing will double the server count for site symmetry.
importPreview.noPcoresNote: Total pCores could not be read from this file and must be entered manually before advancing to Step 2.
